title: Unstable SMP Orbital Strike Cannons
description: Adds Wemmbu's "stabshot" and "nukeshot" orbital strike cannons into the game
body:
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e030792bd8b78ae40b697d1c35f008c309168f6.png)

---

**Adds Wemmbu's "stabshot" and "nukeshot" orbital strike cannons from the Unstable SMP into the game**

_**For The Datapack -**_

To get the stabshot, run the command: ```/function nuke:give/stabshot```



To get the nukeshot, run the command: ```/function nuke:give/nukeshot```

To get a shulker full of both, run the command: ```/function nuke:give/shulker_of_explosives```

To get the wolfshot, run the command: ```/function nuke:give/wolfshot```

To get a shulker full of wolfshots, run the command: ```/function nuke:give/shulker_of_wolfs```

_**For The Plugin -**_

To get the stabshot, run the command: ```/give_stabshot```

To get the nukeshot, run the command: ```/give_nukeshot```

To get a shulker full of both, run the command: ```/give_shulker```

**_You'll need to be opperator permissions to use these commands_**

[**Gameplay**](https://medal.tv/games/minecraft/clips/lZf57zQQ8PAd-mpGj?invite=cr-MSx2dFIsMzEzMzExMzI2&v=38)

![Nukeshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/972dc1249a9924daaf04ea59e68503d931660386.png)

# Installation Guide
Singleplayer (Existing World)
---

Download the datapack .zip folder.

Open Minecraft and navigate to your Singleplayer world list.

Select the world you want to add it to, click **Edit**, and then click **Open World Folder**.

Find and open the datapacks folder.

**Move** or paste the downloaded .zip file into this folder (you do not need to unzip it).

Singleplayer (New World)
---

Download the datapack .zip folder.

In Minecraft, go to Singleplayer and click **Create New World**.

Navigate to the **More tab** at the top of the screen and click **Data Packs**.

Drag and drop the downloaded .zip file directly into the Minecraft window, then click **Yes** to confirm.

Hover over the datapack in the **"Available"** column and click the arrow to move it to the **"Selected"** column.

Click **Done** and finish creating your world.

Multiplayer (Server)
---

Download the datapack .zip file.

Access your server files through your server host's web panel.

Open your main world folder (usually named world, depending on your server settings).

Open the datapacks folder.

Upload the .zip file into the datapacks folder.

Restart your server, or type /reload to load the datapack.
